FORM 8-K — CURRENT REPORT

Date of Report: June 1, 2024

Item 5.02 Departure of Directors or Certain Officers; Election of Directors; Appointment of Certain Officers.

On June 1, 2024, the Board of Directors of Initech Inc. (the "Company") elected Dr. Maria K. Patel to serve as a director of the Company, effective immediately. Dr. Patel was appointed to fill a vacancy on the Board created by the recent expansion of the Board from eight to nine members.

Dr. Patel will receive the Company's standard non-employee director compensation, consisting of an annual cash retainer of $90,000 and an annual equity award of restricted stock units with a grant-date fair value of $200,000.

There are no arrangements or understandings between Dr. Patel and any other persons pursuant to which she was selected as a director. There are no transactions involving Dr. Patel that the Company would be required to report pursuant to Item 404(a) of Regulation S-K.
